title: Bag of 5-22mm x 15mm Fitting Reducer - End Feed (Known as Pipe Reducer / 22mm to 15mm Reducer / 22mm Copper Pipe Fittings Also Available in 8mm, 10mm, 12mm, 15mm, 22mm, 28mm, 35mm, 42mm and 54mm)
features: This listing is for a Pack of 5

Being a "fitting reducer" this cannot be used directly onto 22mm pipe but must be inserted into a 22mm pipe fitting such as a coupling or an elbow. 15mm pipe is inserted directly into the other end of the reducer without the need for a 15mm fitting. Should you require a fitting where the two different size pipes are inserted into the reducer, you should purchase the appropriate sized "reducing coupling"
description: Copper End Feed Fitting Reducer - 22mm x 15mm. Introducing the Copper Fitting Reducer - 22mm x 15mm, suitable for various applications.Fitting reducers play a crucial role in connecting different sizes of pipe fittings, where the larger end fits inside a pipe fitting, and the smaller end accepts a pipe. Including direct and indirect hot and cold domestic water services, as well as commercial and industrial uses.The Copper End Feed Reducer offers a cost-effective and straightforward solution for reducing Copper pipe sizes efficiently.This versatile fitting is suitable for water, oil, and gas systems, accommodating both hard and soft water areas. Upgrade your plumbing system with this practical and easy to use Copper End Feed Fitting Reducer.Sizes Available: Fitting Reducer - 10mm, 12mm, 15mm, 22mm, 28mm, 35mm, 42mm and 54mm. Technical Specifications: Copper End Feed Reducer Manufactured From Copper Hot and Cold Water Systems Quality and Reliable Easy to Use Hardwearing Reducing End Feed Lightweight Easy to Install WRAS Approved Other Sizes Available Size - 22mm x 15mm ;Please Note: The larger end fits inside a pipe fitting, and the smaller end accepts a pipe.
